name: OmopVisitCodes
title: OMOP Visit-domain codes (example subset)
description: Codes that route a FHIR Encounter to the OMOP `visit_occurrence` table via Encounter.class. Authoritative expansion: vocab.concept WHERE domain_id = 'Visit' AND standard_concept = 'S' (~25 standard concepts spanning Visit and CMS Place of Service vocabularies). The compose below lists illustrative HL7 v3 ActCode encounter classes plus a couple of CMS POS examples — the real expansion comes from the loaded Athena vocabularies.

extension.valueString: SELECT vocabulary_id, concept_code, concept_name FROM vocab.concept WHERE domain_id = 'Visit' AND standard_concept = 'S'
